title: Urbano Santos Heat Wave
lead: Urbano Santos is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.71. This event has reached a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Urbano Santos has led to a significant increase in Cooling Degree Days (CDD), reaching 12.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 63%, while the wind speed is relatively low at 6.2 km/h. 
 The city's energy consumption is likely to surge due to increased air conditioning usage.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately
